title: Add test submission: 2026-03-23_naive_solution
body:
## Summary

- Test submission to verify the format and submission process
- Unmodified `train_gpt.py` baseline run for 100 steps on a single GPU
- **Not** a competitive entry — just checking that the submission structure is correct

## Metrics

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| val_loss (post-quant) | 3.3216 |
| val_bpb (post-quant) | 1.9672 |
| Total size int8+zlib | 10,481,651 bytes |
| Train time | 33s (100 steps) |

## Included files

- `README.md` — submission description
- `submission.json` — leaderboard metadata
- `train.log` — full training log
- `train_gpt.py` — unmodified baseline snapshot
